jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at FoodWorld
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!
